Supreme Court.description: Highest court in Kenya. Handles constitutional matters and appeals from the Court of Appeal.

Court of Appeal.description: Intermediate appellate court hearing appeals from the High Court.
Court of Appeal.presiding_officer: President of the Court of Appeal

High Court.description: Superior court of record with unlimited original jurisdiction in civil and criminal matters.

Employment and Labour Relations Court.description: Specialized court handling employment and labour disputes.

Environment and Land Court.description: Specialized court handling environmental and land matters.

Tax Appeals Tribunal.description: Tribunal handling tax disputes between taxpayers and KRA.

Magistrate's Court.description: Subordinate court handling civil and criminal cases within its jurisdiction.

Nairobi City County.description: County government responsible for Nairobi City County.
